title: Ismene morrisonii
taxonomy: Ismene morrisonii is classified as a species within the genus Ismene, which is part of the family Amaryllidaceae. The Amaryllidaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the amaryllis or lily family. Ismene morrisonii is native to Peru and is a type of bulbous perennial plant. It is often cultivated for its showy, funnel-shaped flowers and is prized for its exotic and delicate appearance. Within the Amaryllidaceae family, Ismene morrisonii is further grouped into the subfamily Allioideae.
